behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests assert on specific file paths (components/notification/style/index.ts, components/notification/PurePanel.tsx) and specific patterns like '&:first-child' CSS selector and 'token.' prefix for design tokens, but instruction.md names neither these files nor the '&:first-child' selector literal required by the regex in test_css_description_first_child_spacing.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the symptom and requirements (conditional rendering, inline-end spacing with logical properties and design tokens) without specifying exact lines or code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_css_description_first_child_spacing requires the literal '&:first-child' selector and a 'token.' reference; an equally valid fix using a different selector (e.g., `:not(:has(+ .title))` or class-based approach) or a constant value would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include subprocess calls to npm test, jest, eslint, and biome in addition to text checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: The regex-based text tests require specific structural changes, and the jest/lint tests verify runtime behavior; stubs cannot satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both requirements (conditional title render, inline-end spacing on first-child description) are tested, plus existing tests via jest.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively (test_css_description_first_child_spacing, test_pure_content_conditional_title_rendering, etc.) and grouped by concern.

no_typos.reason: No typos observed in paths or identifiers.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references the notification domain generically without naming specific files or lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no agentmd config edits.
